channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-29
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is shifting toward an autonomous agent economy with the launch of TaskBounty's crypto-integrated task management and the introduction of the Orbis API tool for browserless agent subscriptions. Simultaneously, the framework is preparing for a major beta release emphasizing on-chain identity via the SAID Protocol and expanded communication integrations.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor for long-term architecture (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • xProof plugin submission to registry (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on TaskBounty integration for autonomous agents and the status of projects like RUBY and Hyperscape in hackathons....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into the Orbis API tool for browserless API subscriptions and trading flow plugins for agent repositories....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-28
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focusing on transitioning from a framework to a SaaS deployment platform (elizacloud) while integrating advanced autonomous trading and on-chain provenance features. High-velocity community development is centered on plugin registry submissions and clarifying the project's complex organizational boundaries.

GitHub Activity:

  • xProof plugin in ElizaOS plugin registry (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the elizacloud business model, the identity of ecosystem tokens, and resolving community confusion regarding Hyperscape's status as an incubated project....
  • #coders: Professional networking and introductions; 'trace' shared deep expertise in RAG, LLM orchestration, and multi-step agent workflows seeking startup opportunities....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-27
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning from an open-source framework into a commercial SaaS ecosystem with the introduction of elizacloud, Jeju blockchain, and the xProof decision provenance plugin. Significant infrastructure consolidation is underway to streamline the DegenAI hosting environment into a single Spartan instance.

GitHub Activity:

  • xProof plugin in ElizaOS plugin registry (open)
  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Clarifications on the framework vs. SaaS business model (elizacloud). Detailed discussions on token utility for Jeju and DegenAI's role as a platform host....
  • #coders: Promotion of hatcher.host for ElizaOS/Milady hosting and technical deep-dive into xProof.app for MultiversX integration....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-26
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is shifting toward autonomous trading agent development and decentralized identity integrations, punctuated by the launch of the Nosana Builders' Challenge and the release of the Pythia MCP server for on-chain market data.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integrate SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Heavy focus on autonomous trading infrastructure. Discussion of the Pythia MCP server for oracle data and the 'Undesirables' 4,444 agent NFT workspaces....
  • #discussion: Community management including onboarding new members and addressing concerns regarding token price volatility and the Milady app status....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-25
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is addressing a critical supply chain security vulnerability while simultaneously expanding its ecosystem through partnerships with Nosana and the release of on-chain market data tools. The community remains focused on the upcoming Milady app launch and navigating significant token price volatility.

GitHub Activity:

  • Initiated a major database refactor (open)
  • Integrated the SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Discussions focused on the Pythia MCP server release for on-chain data and the critical litellm supply chain security alert. A collaboration inquiry from Coin Post was clarified to prevent unauthorize...
  • #discussion: Announcement of the Nosana partnership and Builders' Challenge workshops. Significant community discussion regarding Eliza token price volatility and 'rug' patterns....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-24
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is currently focused on the final development stages of the Milady app and expanding autonomous agent monetization capabilities on the Base blockchain. However, the project is facing significant community friction due to token price volatility and perceived communication gaps regarding token utility.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol Integration (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on token price decline ($2.5 to $0.0009) and the timeline for the Milady app. Team members emphasized holding and following official updates....
  • #general: Technical architecture clarifications regarding the relationship between ElizaOS, Milady, and OpenClaw to resolve community misunderstandings....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-23
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is expanding through the launch of an autonomous agent monetization plugin on Base and the integration of Babylon for token buybacks, despite ongoing community frustration regarding token utility and communication transparency.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integrate SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on the launch of the autonomous agent monetization plugin and clarifications regarding the lack of a traditional whitepaper. Significant debate occurred regarding token performance and the Babyl...
  • #coders: Minimal technical activity; primarily used for an off-topic marketing manager recruitment post for a meme coin project....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-22
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is navigating a period of high community tension regarding token utility and migration transparency, despite the beta release of the Milady app and successful infrastructure integrations with Babylon and decentralized identity protocols.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve architecture (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Intense debate regarding token price performance (-84% for many), lack of utility, and perceived poor communication from leadership....
  • #coders: Clarification of ecosystem hierarchy: ElizaOS is the base OS; Milady is built on top of it; OpenClaw agents are compatible within Milady....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-21
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is transitioning into a high-velocity phase with the launch of the Babylon market simulation and imminent Milady app release, despite significant community friction regarding token performance and leadership communication. Technical focus has shifted toward decentralized identity via the SAID protocol and resolving ElizaCloud infrastructure deployment issues.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on Babylon integration benefits (airdrops and buybacks) and heated debate regarding Eliza token price drops and perceived leadership absence....
  • #coders: Troubleshooting ElizaCloud disk image upload failures and GPG key issues in the Milady repository....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-20
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is facing a severe liquidity and confidence crisis as the token reached new all-time lows, while technical development continues with new plugin releases and cloud infrastructure testing. Tensions are high regarding leadership absence and the perceived failure of the Milady-to-ElizaOS migration.

GitHub Activity:

  • Integrated the SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Community distress over token price performance, delistings, and perceived leadership absence, with Odilitime serving as the primary team liaison....
  • #coders: Focus on the release of the Moltraffle raffle plugin and Troubleshooting Eliza Cloud deployment errors related to missing Discord modules....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-19
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is transitioning into a high-velocity launch phase with the imminent release of the Milady app and Babylon platform, alongside significant new infrastructure for decentralized agent persistence. However, the team is facing critical community pressure regarding token performance and transparency issues related to the ai16z migration supply.

GitHub Activity:

  • v2.0.0 skills folder implementation (open)
  • SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on product roadmap (Milady, Babylon, Hyperscape) and addressing intense community frustration regarding token price drops and team communication....
  • #coders: Announcement of the Ensoul persistence plugin for decentralized agent memory and behavior storage....
  • xfn-framework: Technical refactoring of the plugin registry to improve naming consistency for form-related plugins....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-18
item.description:
Summary: Discussions centered on the ElizaOS v2.0.0 architecture and the upcoming elizacloud product launch, contrasted by significant community friction regarding token migration transparency and price performance.

GitHub Activity:

  • v2.0.0 skills folder implementation (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy debate regarding ELIZA token performance and the marketing strategy involving Shaw's promotion of Milady to drive elizacloud distribution....
  • #coders: Technical issues with role assignment forms and introduction of high-level AI/Full-stack developers to the community....
  • #xfn-framework: Discussion on establishing a structured registry system for skills and plugins similar to Clawhub....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-17
item.description:
Summary: Development has pivoted toward elizaOS v2.0.0 architectural decisions and multi-chain data integration, while the community is demanding immediate transparency regarding the ai16z to elizaOS token migration analytics.

GitHub Activity:

  • Runtime refactor and skills folder implementation (open)
  • Database refactor for long-term architecture (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on token migration transparency concerns and the introduction of the Z1N on-chain signaling protocol....
  • #coders: Discussion of human-in-the-loop (HITL) capabilities via Effect AI and technical plugin fixes for EVM chains....
  • xfn-framework: Architectural debate regarding decentralized skill discovery (skills.md) versus a centralized core folder....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-16
item.description:
Summary: Discussions shifted from technical agent capabilities to production-readiness, focusing on user trust, enterprise UI, and the introduction of x402Guard for decentralized agent security. Meanwhile, significant hardware-driven market adoption for OpenClaw was reported in China, alongside the closure of the ai16z-to-ElizaOS migration window.

GitHub Activity:

  • Database refactor for long-term architecture (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • N8N workflow plugin REST API (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Deep dive into x402Guard security model featuring per-step transaction evaluation and layered limits to prevent agent exploits....
  • #discussion: Administrative actions regarding user unbans and inquiries regarding Solana dApp development capabilities....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-15
item.description:
Summary: The community is focused on major architectural refactoring of the Eliza framework and the emergence of significant product-market fit for OpenClaw in the Chinese market. New security infrastructure for DeFi agents and prediction market integrations are also moving toward release.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor to improve long-term system architecture (open)
  • Integration of SAID Protocol for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Adding cloud-related content to elizaos.github.io (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on OpenClaw's market success in China and the announcement of Milady prediction market integrations using Kalshi and Polymarket data....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into x402Guard security proxy and implementation of agent discovery via skill.md files....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-14
item.description:
Summary: Development has shifted towards the Eliza 2.0.0 alpha release and core architecture refactoring, while the community remains focused on security vigilance following the closure of the AI16Z to elizaOS token migration.

GitHub Activity:

  • Add git branch analysis tool (prr) (open)
  • Add cloud-related content to documentation (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Technical discussions focused on automation via cron triggers for agent wake-up, resolving plugin initialization race conditions, and shifting to a microservices approach for embeddings....
  • #discussion: Community support largely addressed the closed token migration, clarified the elizaOS buyback business model, and warned against active phishing attempts....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-13
item.description:
Summary: elizaOS is undergoing a major architectural transition with a proposed runtime refactor to address technical debt while simultaneously expanding its ecosystem through the Milady app launch and autonomous agent registries.

GitHub Activity:

  • Update pipeline to include elizaos/cloud repository (open)
  • Git branch story analysis tool implementation (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #xfn-framework: Deep technical discussion on refactoring the AgentRuntime 'god object' (6000+ lines) and transitioning infrastructure components from side-effects to explicit constructor arguments....
  • #dec-coders: Introduction of the Autonomous Economy Protocol (AEP) for agent payments and the launch of aiprox.dev, a registry where agents autonomously register and hire one another....
  • #discussion: Community members raised concerns about token price and utility; team responded by clarifying the cloud-profit buyback model and confirming the Milady app timeline....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-12
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem reached a major milestone with the release of the Eliza 2.0.0 alpha and the launch of the Babylon platform to its first 50,000 users. Technical development is prioritizing architecture modularity, specifically through cloud-based embedding microservices and a new git branch storytelling tool.

GitHub Activity:

  • Implementation of git branch storytelling tool (open)
  • Fixes for GitHub issue #71 in milady-ai/milady (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on product launches (Babylon, 2.0 Alpha) and addressing community anxiety regarding token price performance and team presence....
  • #coders: Technical deep dive into AI agent wallet security and the announcement of the Autonomous Economy Protocol (AEP) for on-chain payments....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-11
item.description:
Summary: The project is navigating significant community tension regarding token performance and communication while simultaneously advancing technical architectures for elizaOS v2.0.0 and the new Autonomous Economy Protocol. Development focus has shifted toward serverless infrastructure, prompt batching subsystems, and automated update workflows to address transparency concerns.

GitHub Activity:

  • APT repository distribution for Debian/Ubuntu (open)
  • Major database refactor (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High tension regarding token price vs. project delivery. Odilitime committed to restoring the $elizaos holders system and strengthening investor relations....
  • #xfn-framework: Technical deep dive into v2.0.0 branch. Focus on reducing LLM overhead through prompt batching and exploring lazy-loading for services....
  • #coders: Announcement of the Autonomous Economy Protocol (AEP) for on-chain agent payments and the Season 1 Genesis Program....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-03-10
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS community is currently navigating a period of significant tension characterized by sharp declines in token value and project communication concerns, while simultaneously seeing high-level B2B architectural proposals and expansion into enterprise integrations like WhatsApp and Gmail.

GitHub Activity:

  • Major database refactor (open)
  • SAID Protocol integration for on-chain Solana identity (merged)
  • Embedding failures on Linux environments (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on token price FUD and project management feedback balanced by high-level B2B hiring and architectural pitches....
  • #coders: Technical troubleshooting regarding agent-to-agent communication timers and cost-efficient voice plugin alternatives....
